title: 20% Paraformaldehyde in 5X PBS
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"653ss","text":"This protocol is used to prepare 20% Paraformaldehyde (PFA) in 5X Phosphate-buffered saline (PBS). 20% PFA in 5X PBS is utilized to make the 4% PFA in 1X PBS reagent.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"738as","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"21ojo","text":"Note: Research reported in this publication was supported by the National Institute Of Mental Health of the National Institutes of Health under Award Number U19MH114830.
